productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Boys Polo Red T-Shirt
description: Style NoteStretchy and comfy room-to-grow style tee from Gini and Jony, a pint-sized version of his dad's T-shirt. The go-to tee for summertime games and fun, this piece will last longer than his scruffy escapades!Product DetailsRed polo T-shirt, has a spread collar, buttoned placket, short sleeves (with embroidery on the right sleeve) and decorative embroidery on the left chestMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroidery
